caption: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a black long-sleeved shirt, is in a kitchen setting. The background features white cabinets, light-colored walls, a green curtain, and a stove area with various kitchen utensils and containers. In the top-left frame, she looks toward the camera and speaks. By the top-right frame, she is gesturing with her hands while continuing to talk. In the bottom-left frame, she leans forward and reaches toward a metal pot on the stove. In the final frame, she lifts the lid of the pot. The text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" appears in the top-left corner of every frame, accompanied by a stylized logo of three curved lines. The woman is the only person visible throughout the sequence, and the camera angle remains static as she interacts with the cooking equipment.
